title: FarmersMC
body:
![Pack Description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/66f8ea8972d6eb5e6b5252772724eeb898a59882.png)

Welcome to FarmersMC,
A Modpack about farming and producing.

**Features:**
- Create + Add-Ons
- Farmers Delight
- Many Let's Do Mods
- Custom Biomes
- Automobiles
- Fishing Overhaul
- More Animals & Mobs
- And many more!

**So welcome to the farming life!**
